channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two People Charged in Connection with Death of Burnaby Man
item.description: The Integrated Homicide Investigation Team (IHIT) has charged two individuals with first-degree murder following the death of 45-year-old Burnaby resident Masood Masjoody. Mehdi Ahmadzadeh Razavi, 48,...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens transport and maritime services to boost safety and development
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM: Tanzania government is stepping up efforts to modernize its transport infrastructure and maritime rescue services, aiming to enhance safety of people and property while supporting susta...

item.title: FCC chair warns broadcasters they risk losing licences over alleged misleading coverage of Iran conflict
item.description: Brendan Carr, the chair of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) under the Trump administration, has issued a stark warning to US broadcasters, suggesting that those disseminating what he descri...

item.title: Body of Mumbai-based seafarer to be repatriated next week after tanker attack
item.description: Mumbai resident Deonandan Prasad Singh, aged 54, who was serving as an additional chief engineer aboard the Marshall Islands-flagged oil tanker MT Safesea Vishnu, tragically lost his life when the ves...

item.title: Uzodimma Says Tinubu’s Economic Reforms Helped Nigeria Avoid Fuel Crisis
item.description: The Governor of Imo State, Hope Uzodimma, yarn say the economic reforms wey President Bola Ahmed Tinubu put for ground don help shield Nigeria from wahala wey fit happen for fuel sector because of the...

item.title: Baguio City records 9°C low amid ongoing amihan season
item.description: Baguio City residents woke up to a particularly chilly morning as the temperature plummeted to 9 degrees Celsius at 5 a.m., according to data from the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomi...

item.title: Okoth Obado defends 900-acre land lease plan in Migori for community projects and mining
item.description: Former Migori Governor Okoth Obado has responded to allegations that he and his family are trying to unlawfully acquire 900 acres of land in Nyatike, Migori County, for mining and cotton farming. Obad...

item.title: Long COVID Continues to Impact Thousands in Los Angeles County with Chronic Illness and Disability
item.description: As Los Angeles County moves on from the acute phase of the COVID-19 pandemic, thousands of residents continue to suffer from long COVID, a chronic condition that manifests in fatigue, cognitive diffic...

item.title: How to Apply to Ardhi University Online and Programmes Offered
item.description: Ardhi University (ARU) is a leading Tanzanian institution offering a wide range of programmes from certificate to PhD levels. Founded in 1956 as the Survey Training School, ARU has grown over the deca...

item.title: Government invests 25bn/- to improve Moshi Police College facilities
item.description: The Tanzanian government has set aside 25 billion shillings to upgrade the Tanzania Police College in Moshi, Kilimanjaro Region. This move is part of a broader initiative to strengthen the capacity of...

item.title: Timothée Chalamet sparks debate on attracting young audiences to opera and ballet
item.description: Timothée Chalamet recently sparked discussion by suggesting that opera and ballet are no longer widely appreciated. While his comment drew criticism from performers, fans, and major institutions, it a...

item.title: Reflections on Faith, Easter, and the Human Spirit
item.description: In her article, Carol Frost reflects on the spiritual insights of poet Gerard Manley Hopkins, particularly his vision of the 'immortal diamond' that represents the human soul united with Christ. Frost...

item.title: Father kills daughter and her partner in Gujarat over disapproved relationship
item.description: In a tragic incident reported from Gujarat, a father reportedly killed his daughter and her boyfriend, citing his disapproval of their relationship. Such incidents, though shocking, sadly underline th...

item.title: Philip Acop emerges victorious in Antipolo 2nd District special election
item.description: Philip Acop has officially won the special election for Antipolo City's 2nd District, securing his position as the newly elected representative. The special election was conducted to fill the vacancy ...

item.title: Ongoing Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of March 15, 2026
item.description: As of March 15, 2026, tensions in the Middle East continue to escalate. Reports indicate that the United States and Iran have conducted airstrikes in critical areas, further heightening regional insta...

item.title: Prince Harry's spokesperson rejects claims that Meghan influenced him
item.description: A spokesperson for Prince Harry has strongly criticised a forthcoming biography by Tom Bower, which alleges that Meghan Markle 'brainwashed' her husband. The claims, published in extracts in The Times...

item.title: How to Rebuild Yourself After a Break-Up
item.description: The end of a relationship can shake your sense of self, leaving you alone with the quiet and questioning your identity. This period is not a sign of weakness, but the start of personal growth. Break-u...

item.title: Court allows Al-Quds Day protest to proceed in Toronto despite provincial opposition
item.description: The Al-Quds Day demonstration took place in downtown Toronto on Saturday after a judge denied Ontario's request to block the event. Ontario Premier Doug Ford expressed strong disappointment with the r...

item.title: ADC Sets Dates for Ward, Local Government, State Congresses and April 14 National Convention
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don announce say dem go hold their National Convention on April 14, 2026, as part of effort to restructure the party leadership nationwide. According to the offic...

item.title: Public to vote on artwork created from timber of felled Sycamore Gap tree
item.description: The National Trust is inviting the public to help decide which artist will create an artwork from the wood of the Sycamore Gap tree, which was illegally felled in September 2023. The iconic tree, loca...
